name: Dolo 650 Tablet
description: Dolo 650 is one of India's most trusted paracetamol brands, used for relief from fever, headache, body ache and mild to moderate pain. It works by blocking the chemical messengers in the brain responsible for pain and fever.
highlights: Fast and effective relief from fever and pain
Gentle on the stomach when taken as directed
dosage: Adults: 1 tablet every 6–8 hours after food, or as directed by your physician. Do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours.
usage: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Take after meals to avoid stomach upset.

name: Crocin Advance 500 Tablet
description: Crocin Advance contains Optizorb technology that helps the tablet disperse up to 5x faster, providing quick relief from headache, fever and body pain.
highlights: Relief from headache, fever & body pain
Suitable for adults and children above 12 years
dosage: Adults: 1–2 tablets every 4–6 hours. Maximum 8 tablets in 24 hours.
usage: Take with water. Can be taken with or without food.

name: Azithral 500 Tablet
description: Azithral 500 is a macrolide antibiotic used to treat various bacterial infections of the respiratory tract, ear, nose, throat and skin. It must be taken only under medical supervision.
highlights: Short 3–5 day course in most infections
dosage: As prescribed by your doctor. Typically once daily for 3–5 days.
usage: Take at least 1 hour before or 2 hours after meals. Complete the full course even if you feel better.

name: Augmentin 625 Duo Tablet
description: Augmentin 625 Duo is a penicillin-class combination antibiotic effective against a wide range of bacterial infections including sinusitis, throat infections, and urinary tract infections.
dosage: As prescribed by your doctor. Typically twice daily with meals.
usage: Take with a meal to reduce stomach upset. Complete the full course.

name: Pan 40 Tablet
description: Pan 40 contains pantoprazole, a proton pump inhibitor that reduces stomach acid production. It is used in acidity, heartburn, GERD and stomach ulcers.
highlights: Best taken before the first meal of the day
dosage: 1 tablet once daily before breakfast, or as directed by your physician.
usage: Swallow whole on an empty stomach, 30–60 minutes before food.

name: Telma 40 Tablet
description: Telma 40 contains telmisartan, an angiotensin receptor blocker used to treat high blood pressure and protect the heart and kidneys in long-term therapy.
dosage: 1 tablet once daily at the same time each day, as prescribed.
usage: Can be taken with or without food. Do not stop without consulting your doctor.

name: Glycomet GP 1 Tablet
description: Glycomet GP 1 is a combination of metformin and glimepiride used to control blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes, improving the body's response to insulin.
highlights: Take with the first bite of your meal
dosage: As prescribed. Usually once daily with breakfast.
usage: Take with food to avoid stomach upset. Monitor blood sugar regularly.

name: Allegra 120mg Tablet
description: Allegra 120 provides 24-hour non-drowsy relief from sneezing, runny nose, itchy or watery eyes and other allergy symptoms caused by dust, pollen and pets.
dosage: Adults: 1 tablet once daily.
usage: Take with water, preferably before exposure to allergens.

name: Okacet Cetirizine Tablet
description: Okacet is a fast-acting antihistamine for relief from allergic rhinitis, sneezing, itching and hives. A trusted everyday allergy remedy at an affordable price.
highlights: Single tablet lasts up to 24 hours
dosage: Adults: 1 tablet once daily, preferably at night.
usage: Swallow with water. May cause mild drowsiness.

name: Combiflam Tablet
description: Combiflam combines ibuprofen and paracetamol for stronger relief from headache, muscle pain, toothache, joint pain and fever.
highlights: Effective for tooth, muscle and joint pain
dosage: Adults: 1 tablet every 8 hours after food. Max 3 tablets/day.
usage: Always take after food to protect the stomach lining.
sideEffects: Stomach pain if taken empty stomach

name: Volini Pain Relief Spray
description: Volini spray provides quick, targeted relief from back pain, neck pain, sprains, muscle pulls and joint pain. Its no-touch application makes it convenient anywhere.
highlights: Acts within minutes on sprains & strains
usage: Spray on the affected area from 3–5 cm away, 3–4 times daily. Do not bandage tightly.

name: Moov Pain Relief Cream
description: Moov is an ayurvedic pain relief cream with wintergreen oil and eucalyptus that penetrates deep to relieve back pain, sprains and muscular aches.
usage: Massage gently onto the affected area 2–3 times a day.

name: Vicks VapoRub
description: Vicks VapoRub provides relief from blocked nose, cough and cold with the soothing vapours of menthol, camphor and eucalyptus oil.
usage: Rub gently on chest, throat and back. For steam inhalation, add a spoonful to hot water.

name: Benadryl Cough Syrup
description: Benadryl cough formula provides effective relief from cough and throat irritation, loosening mucus and suppressing the urge to cough.
dosage: Adults: 10 ml every 4–6 hours. Children: as directed by physician.
usage: Shake well before use. Use the measuring cup provided.

name: Digene Antacid Gel — Mint
description: Digene gel quickly neutralises excess stomach acid, relieving acidity, heartburn, gas and indigestion with a refreshing mint flavour.
dosage: 2 teaspoonfuls after meals and at bedtime, or as directed.
usage: Shake well before use. Do not take within 2 hours of other medicines.

name: Electral Powder ORS
description: Electral is a WHO-recommended oral rehydration salt formula that restores body fluids and electrolytes lost due to dehydration, diarrhoea or heat.
usage: Dissolve the entire sachet in 1 litre of clean drinking water. Consume within 24 hours.

name: Ecosprin 75 Tablet
description: Ecosprin 75 is a low-dose aspirin used to prevent blood clots, reducing the risk of heart attack and stroke in at-risk patients.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after food, or as prescribed by your cardiologist.
usage: Swallow whole, do not crush or chew. Take after meals.

name: Shelcal 500 Tablet
description: Shelcal 500 is a calcium and vitamin D3 supplement that supports strong bones and teeth, recommended widely for women, seniors and those with low dietary calcium.
ingredients: Calcium Carbonate 1250 mg (equiv. 500 mg elemental calcium)
dosage: 1 tablet once or twice daily after meals.
usage: Best absorbed when taken after food.

name: Thyronorm 50mcg Tablet
description: Thyronorm 50 contains thyroxine, a replacement for the hormone normally produced by the thyroid gland, used to treat hypothyroidism.
highlights: Take on empty stomach for best absorption
Most prescribed thyroid brand in India
dosage: As prescribed. Usually once daily on an empty stomach, 30–60 min before breakfast.
usage: Take at the same time daily. Avoid taking with calcium or iron supplements.

name: Montair LC Tablet
description: Montair LC combines montelukast and levocetirizine for the management of allergic rhinitis and asthma-related symptoms like sneezing, wheezing and breathlessness.
highlights: Dual action for allergy & asthma symptoms
dosage: 1 tablet once daily in the evening, as prescribed.
usage: Take regularly, even when symptom-free, for full benefit.

name: Betadine 10% Ointment
description: Betadine ointment is a povidone-iodine antiseptic used to prevent and treat infection in minor cuts, wounds, burns and abrasions.
usage: Clean the wound and apply a thin layer 1–3 times daily. Cover with a sterile bandage if needed.

name: Saridon Tablet
description: Saridon is a triple-action formula for fast headache relief, starting to work in as little as 15 minutes.
dosage: Adults: 1 tablet up to 3 times a day.
usage: Take with water at the first sign of headache.

name: Zincovit Multivitamin Tablet
description: Zincovit combines essential vitamins, minerals and grape seed extract to fill nutritional gaps, boost immunity and fight fatigue.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after a meal, or as directed.
usage: Best taken after breakfast for all-day energy.

name: Strepsils Orange Lozenges
description: Strepsils lozenges provide soothing relief from sore throat with dual antiseptic action, in a tangy orange flavour with vitamin C.
highlights: Tangy orange flavour with Vitamin C
usage: Dissolve one lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2–3 hours. Max 12 per day.

name: Gelusil MPS Chewable Tablet
description: Gelusil MPS chewable tablets neutralise acid instantly and relieve gas and bloating with a pleasant mint flavour — handy relief on the go.
dosage: Chew 1–2 tablets after meals and at bedtime.
usage: Chew thoroughly before swallowing. Do not exceed 8 tablets daily.

name: Neurobion Forte Tablet
description: Neurobion Forte is a vitamin B-complex supplement that supports nerve health, helping relieve tingling, numbness and weakness caused by B-vitamin deficiency.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after food, or as directed by your physician.
usage: Take consistently for at least 8–12 weeks for noticeable benefit.

name: HK Vitals Multivitamin
description: HK Vitals Multivitamin delivers 23 essential nutrients with zinc and vitamin C for daily immunity, energy and overall wellness — formulated for Indian dietary needs.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after breakfast.
usage: Take consistently with food for best absorption.

name: MuscleBlaze Biozyme Whey Gold
description: MuscleBlaze Biozyme Whey Gold is a clinically tested whey isolate with enhanced absorption formula, delivering 25g protein per scoop for muscle recovery and growth.
highlights: 25 g protein & 5.5 g BCAA per scoop
usage: Mix 1 scoop with 180–200 ml water or milk post-workout.

name: ON Gold Standard 100% Whey
packSize: Jar of 907 g — Double Rich Chocolate
description: The world's best-selling whey protein with 24g of blended whey isolates per serving, ideal for building lean muscle and faster recovery.
highlights: 24 g protein with whey isolates as primary source
usage: Mix 1 scoop in 240 ml cold water or milk after exercise.

name: Dabur Chyawanprash
description: Dabur Chyawanprash is a time-tested ayurvedic immunity builder with 40+ herbs including amla and ashwagandha, supporting strength and respiratory wellness for the whole family.
dosage: Adults: 1 teaspoon twice daily. Children: ½ teaspoon daily.
usage: Take with warm milk or water, preferably in the morning and evening.

name: Himalaya Ashvagandha Tablets
description: Himalaya Ashvagandha is a pure-herb adaptogen that helps the body manage stress, supports restful sleep and improves energy and vitality.
dosage: 1 tablet twice daily after meals.
usage: Use consistently for 8–12 weeks for best results.

name: Baidyanath Triphala Churna
description: A classical ayurvedic blend of amla, haritaki and bibhitaki that gently supports digestion, regularity and detoxification.
dosage: 1 teaspoon with warm water at bedtime.
usage: Mix with lukewarm water or honey before sleep.

name: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser
description: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is a dermatologist-recommended, soap-free cleanser that hydrates while it cleans — ideal for sensitive and dry skin.
usage: Apply to wet skin, massage gently and rinse. Use twice daily.

name: Minimalist 10% Niacinamide Serum
description: A potent 10% niacinamide serum that reduces acne marks, controls oil and evens skin tone — fragrance-free and non-comedogenic.
usage: Apply 3–4 drops on cleansed face in the evening. Follow with moisturiser.

name: Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Wash
description: A gentle daily face wash with vitamin C and turmeric that brightens dull skin and fights free-radical damage — free of sulphates and parabens.
highlights: No sulphates, parabens or mineral oil
usage: Massage onto wet face for 30 seconds, rinse. Use twice daily.

name: WOW Onion Black Seed Hair Oil
description: Cold-pressed onion black seed oil blend that strengthens roots, controls hair fall and boosts shine — with no mineral oil or silicones.
highlights: No mineral oil, silicones or parabens
usage: Massage into scalp 2–3 times weekly. Leave for at least 1 hour before washing.

name: Dettol Liquid Handwash Refill
description: Dettol's trusted germ-protection handwash removes 99.9% of illness-causing germs while keeping hands soft with added moisturisers.
usage: Apply a coin-sized amount on wet hands, lather for 20 seconds, rinse.

name: Whisper Ultra Clean XL+ Pads
description: Whisper Ultra Clean with herbal oil provides up to 100% leakage protection for 12 hours with a soft, dry top layer.
highlights: Soft top sheet with herbal oil
usage: Change every 6–8 hours for best hygiene.
manufacturer: Procter & Gamble Hygiene & Health Care Ltd, Mumbai

name: Durex Extra Time Condoms
description: Durex Extra Time condoms with benzocaine 5% help extend intimacy, made from premium natural rubber latex with 100% electronic testing.
usage: Read the leaflet carefully before use. Single use only.

name: WOW Apple Cider Vinegar
description: Raw, unfiltered apple cider vinegar with the 'mother', supporting metabolism, digestion and weight management goals.
usage: Dilute 1–2 teaspoons in a glass of warm water before meals.

name: OZiva Protein & Herbs for Women
description: A clean, plant-based protein with ayurvedic herbs like shatavari and giloy, designed for women's daily nutrition, hormonal balance and toned fitness.
usage: Blend 1 scoop with 200 ml water or milk, once daily.

name: Limcee Vitamin C Chewable
description: Limcee chewable vitamin C tablets support immunity, collagen formation and faster recovery — a tangy daily immunity habit.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after a meal.
usage: Chew thoroughly before swallowing.

name: HK Vitals Fish Oil 1000mg
description: Double-strength omega-3 fish oil with 360 mg EPA and 240 mg DHA per serving for heart, brain, joint and eye health.
dosage: 1 softgel daily after a meal.
usage: Swallow whole with water after food.

name: Supradyn Daily Multivitamin
description: Supradyn combines 12 vitamins and 11 minerals & trace elements to fight daily fatigue and keep energy levels high through busy days.
dosage: 1 tablet daily after breakfast.
usage: Swallow with water after food.

name: Revital H for Men
description: Revital H for Men is a daily health supplement with natural ginseng, vitamins and minerals that helps maintain energy, stamina and immunity.
dosage: 1 capsule daily after breakfast.
usage: Take regularly for sustained benefits.

name: Patanjali Pure Honey
description: Pure, natural multi-floral honey — a wholesome substitute for sugar that supports immunity, digestion and weight management.
usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons with warm water in the morning, or as a sweetener.

name: MuscleBlaze Creatine Monohydrate
description: Micronised creatine monohydrate that boosts strength, power output and muscle recovery — lab-tested for purity.
usage: Mix 1 scoop (3 g) with water or juice, daily — ideally post-workout.

name: Protinex Diabetes Care
description: A specialised nutrition drink for people with diabetes, with high protein, fibre and a low glycaemic index to help manage blood sugar and muscle health.
usage: Mix 2 scoops in 200 ml water or toned milk, once daily.

name: Sugar Free Gold Pellets
description: India's most trusted sugar substitute made from aspartame — sweetness of sugar with zero calories, ideal for diabetics and the calorie-conscious.
usage: Add 1 pellet to tea or coffee in place of 1 teaspoon of sugar.

name: Pampers Active Baby Diapers — L
description: Pampers Active Baby diapers with 5-star skin protection keep your baby's skin dry and healthy for up to 12 hours with breathable softness.
usage: Change every 4–6 hours or when soiled.
manufacturer: Procter & Gamble Hygiene & Health Care Ltd, Mumbai

name: Himalaya Baby Lotion
description: A gentle daily moisturiser for baby's delicate skin, enriched with olive oil and almond oil for all-day nourishment.
usage: Apply gently all over baby's body after bath and before bedtime.

name: Nestlé Cerelac Wheat Apple
description: Iron-fortified baby cereal with the goodness of wheat and real apple, providing 17 essential nutrients for growing babies from 8 months.
usage: Mix 25 g with 100 ml lukewarm water or milk. Use within 4 weeks of opening.

name: Omron HEM-7120 BP Monitor
description: Omron HEM-7120 is a fully automatic digital blood pressure monitor with IntelliSense technology for accurate, comfortable upper-arm measurements at home.
usage: Sit with your back supported, rest your arm on a table at heart level, wrap the cuff and press Start. Measure at the same times daily.

name: Dr Trust Smart Talking BP Monitor
description: A talking blood pressure monitor with a large backlit display, 120-reading memory for two users, and voice guidance in English and Hindi.
usage: Wrap cuff 2 cm above the elbow, sit still and press Start.

name: Accu-Chek Active Glucometer Kit
description: Accu-Chek Active is one of India's most trusted glucometers, giving accurate blood sugar results in about 5 seconds with a tiny 1–2 µL sample.
usage: Insert strip, prick fingertip with the lancing device, touch the drop to the strip edge and read the result.
manufacturer: Roche Diabetes Care India Pvt Ltd

name: Accu-Chek Active Test Strips
description: Genuine Accu-Chek Active test strips with wide dosing area and fast wicking for reliable home glucose monitoring.
usage: Use immediately after removing from the vial. Store cool and dry.
manufacturer: Roche Diabetes Care India Pvt Ltd

name: Omron MC-720 Forehead Thermometer
description: A non-contact infrared thermometer that reads forehead temperature in 1 second — hygienic and ideal for sleeping children.
usage: Hold 1–3 cm from the centre of the forehead and press the button.

name: Dr Trust Flexible Digital Thermometer
description: A fast, waterproof digital thermometer with flexible gold tip for safe oral, underarm or rectal measurement for all ages.
usage: Place under the tongue or armpit until the beep, then read.

name: Beurer PO30 Pulse Oximeter
description: German-engineered fingertip pulse oximeter for measuring oxygen saturation (SpO₂) and pulse rate, with a bright colour display and 4 viewing formats.
usage: Insert fingertip, press the button and keep the hand still for 8–10 seconds.

name: Noise ColorFit Pro 5 Smartwatch
description: A 1.85" AMOLED smartwatch with Bluetooth calling, 24×7 heart-rate, SpO₂ and sleep tracking, and 100+ sports modes — your health companion on the wrist.
highlights: BT calling & health suite (HR, SpO₂, sleep)
usage: Pair with the NoiseFit app to sync health data and notifications.

name: boAt Wave Call 2 Smartwatch
description: boAt Wave Call 2 brings a 1.83" HD display, advanced BT calling, heart rate & SpO₂ monitoring, and 700+ active modes at an unbeatable price.
usage: Pair with the boAt Crest app for full health insights.

name: Xiaomi Smart Band 8
description: The iconic fitness band, refined: 1.62" AMOLED display, 150+ workout modes, continuous heart-rate and sleep tracking with 16-day battery life.
usage: Pair with the Mi Fitness app to track activity and sleep.

name: HealthSense Ultra-Lite Weighing Scale
description: A precise digital bathroom scale with 6mm tempered glass, large backlit LCD and step-on technology — accurate to 100 grams.
usage: Place on a hard, flat surface and step on barefoot for best accuracy.

name: Omron NE-C101 Compressor Nebulizer
description: A reliable compressor nebulizer for effective respiratory therapy at home, delivering medication deep into the airways for asthma, COPD and congestion relief.
usage: Add prescribed medication to the chamber, attach the mask and inhale normally for 10–15 minutes.

name: OneTouch Select Plus Simple Kit
description: OneTouch Select Plus Simple makes daily glucose testing effortless with colour-coded range indicators that instantly show if readings are low, in-range or high.
usage: Insert strip, apply a small blood drop and read in 5 seconds.

name: Philips InnoSpire Mini Nebulizer
description: A compact, travel-friendly compressor nebulizer from Philips Respironics with fast treatment times and consistent medication delivery.
usage: Assemble, add medication, and breathe normally through the mouthpiece or mask.

name: Boldfit Gym Shaker Pro 700ml
description: A leak-proof, BPA-free shaker bottle with stainless steel blender ball for smooth, lump-free protein shakes anywhere.
usage: Add liquid first, then powder. Shake 20–30 seconds.

name: Flamingo Orthopaedic Heating Pad
description: An electric heating pad with three heat settings for drug-free relief from back pain, joint stiffness, cramps and muscle spasms.
usage: Place over the painful area for 15–20 minutes at a comfortable heat level.
